description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure with a medium build, depicted with a short, neatly trimmed beard and closely cropped hair. He is dressed in a collared, long-sleeve button-up shirt with a subtle vertical stripe pattern, paired with fitted trousers and casual shoes. The shirt is tucked in, giving a tidy and semi-formal appearance suitable for urban environments such as offices, streets, or public spaces. The figure's arms are extended horizontally to the sides, and his facial features are simplified but expressive, with large eyes and a defined jawline. The shoes are low-profile and appear comfortable for walking. The overall design is clean and modern, with smooth surfaces and minimal detailing.
description: A stylized adult male in a striped button-up shirt, fitted trousers, and casual shoes, with a short beard and cropped hair. The figure has a clean, semi-formal urban appearance and simplified, expressive features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, beard, striped shirt, and both arms extended horizontally.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, nose, beard, and the side seam of the shirt and trousers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shirt, and trousers, with both arms extended.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, beard, and the side of the outfit.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve button-up shirt and fitted trousers
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
